arts.ttl: Chelsea vs. Nottingham Forest: Jadon Sancho attempting to match all-time record
arts.sum: Chelsea winger Jadon Sancho will be attempting to equal an all-time record when the Blues square off against Nottingham Forest in the Premier League on Sunday.

arts.ttl: De Ligt branded a ‘League One player’ after troubled Man Utd start
arts.sum: Former Norway and Premier League striker Jan Age Fjortoft spoke harshly of De Ligt ’s performance, saying at times he looked like a League One Player. De Ligt has had a difficult start to his Manchester United career after arriving this summer from Bayern Munich for an initial fee of €45 million, with a further €5m in potential add-ons.

arts.ttl: Man Utd and Man City 'schedule meetings' in bid to sign Swansea City teen talents
arts.sum: Man Utd and Man City are both in the hunt for two of Swansea City's top academy prospects in Harlan Perry and Brogan Popham, who have attracted interest from a host of Premier League clubs

arts.ttl: Man Utd are always slow to pull the trigger – can Erik ten Hag dodge the bullet again?
arts.sum: A familiar set of events is unfolding at Old Trafford, writes Richard Jolly, but can Ten Hag escape before he is sucked down?

arts.ttl: I couldn't believe what West Ham offered for Harry Maguire - it was insulting to Man United
arts.sum: Manchester United news as former West Ham scout Mick Brown has explained the extent of bid for Harry Maguire after the Hammers tried to sign him 14 months ago

arts.ttl: Aston Villa vs Manchester United – Match Preview and Team News
arts.sum: Manchester United visit Aston Villa this Sunday, in a game that could have a huge say on Erik ten Hag’s future. Both clubs participated in Europe this week with Aston Villa recording a famous 1-0 win over German heavyweights Bayern Munich, whilst United found a late leveller earn a point at Porto. Villa’s busy schedule […] The post Aston Villa vs Manchester United – Match Preview and Team News first appeared on The Football Faithful.

arts.ttl: Man United linked with £50m transfer offer for Aston Villa key man
arts.sum: Manchester United have been linked with a transfer offer for Aston Villa centre half Pau Torres. Torres has played 47 games to date for Villa, scoring twice last season - one to rescue a point at Wolves and another in the impressive victory over Tottenham Hotspur.

arts.ttl: Manchester United poised to bring in EFL coach
